message:
feat: notify-only mode and runtime improvements across core modules

Add notify-only watch mode support and improve runtime coordination:

config.rs:
- Add notify_only config field for watch command

mcp.rs:
- Update tool schemas for notify-only mode parameter

runtime.rs:
- Add event filtering for notify-only mode
- Improve concurrent event coordination

workflows.rs:
- Simplify workflow state transitions
- Remove redundant state checks

webhook.rs:
- Add delivery status tracking

tui/query.rs:
- Update query display for notify-only events

main.rs:
- Add --notify-only flag to watch command
- Wire notify-only through to runtime configuration
- Improve argument parsing and validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1066,6 +1066,7 @@ url = "http://localhost:8080/hook"
         // Verify that NotificationConfig can produce working components
         let nc = crate::config::NotificationConfig {
             enabled: true,
+            notify_only: false,
             cooldown_ms: 1000,
             dedup_window_ms: 5000,
             include: vec!["codex.*".to_string()],
